# The `concurrent` package[¶](#the-concurrent-package "Link to this heading")

This package contains the following modules:

* [`concurrent.futures`](concurrent.futures.html#module-concurrent.futures "concurrent.futures: Execute computations concurrently using threads or processes.") – Launching parallel tasks
* [`concurrent.interpreters`](concurrent.interpreters.html#module-concurrent.interpreters "concurrent.interpreters: Multiple interpreters in the same process") – Multiple interpreters in the same process

#### Previous topic

[`multiprocessing.shared_memory` — Shared memory for direct access across processes](multiprocessing.shared_memory.html "previous chapter")
